ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., V, A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_acquisition_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data acquisition system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data acquisition system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data acquisition system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the data acquisition system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the data acquisition system */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoder_data" (
  "encoder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoder data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the encoder data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the encoder data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the encoder data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encoder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoder_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoder_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adc_data" (
  "adc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ADC data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the ADC data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the ADC data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the ADC data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adc_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adc_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voltage_data" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voltage data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the voltage data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the voltage data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the voltage data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltage_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltage_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "current_data" (
  "current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the current data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the current data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the current data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_current_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_current_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the temperature data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the temperature data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the temperature data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., csv, txt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_categories_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
